title: Leave Request
description: Request vacation, sick leave, or personal time off from your manager.
purpose: Request leave from work starting [start date] to [end date] due to [reason]
prompt: Write a request for time off.

title: Resignation Letter
description: A formal notice of resignation to submit to your supervisor.
purpose: Formally resign from my position as [Title] with my last day being [Date]

title: Meeting Request
description: Schedule a sync or project discussion with clients or team members.
purpose: Schedule a 30-minute sync to discuss the project milestones

title: Client Proposal Follow-up
description: Follow up with a prospective client regarding a sent project proposal.
purpose: Follow up on the proposal sent last week and check if they have any questions

title: Assignment Extension
description: Request a deadline extension on an assignment from your professor.
purpose: Request a 3-day extension on the homework assignment due to unexpected sickness

title: Event Invitation
description: Invite friends, family, or colleagues to a celebration or party.
purpose: Invite colleagues to celebrate my birthday next Friday at 6 PM

title: Refund Request Response
description: Respond to a customer asking for a refund for a product or service.
purpose: Approve refund request for customer order [order number] due to [reason]
prompt: Write a polite refund approval email.

title: Product Launch Announcement
description: Announce the release of a new feature or product to your email list.
purpose: Announce the launch of our new product [product name] offering a [discount]% discount
prompt: Write a promotional email for a new product launch.
